testcase.name: Project Loading should load the same number of projects as folders in ~/.claude/projects
Project Loading should load projects with sessions and todos

testcase.name: Project Loading should report detailed loading statistics
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 1. Create test-only Todo list should create an empty todo list file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 1. Create test-only Todo list should handle reading from non-existent file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should add a single todo
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should add multiple todos
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should preserve activeForm field
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder todo from beginning to end
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder todo from end to beginning
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder adjacent todos
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should fail with invalid indices
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should persist reordering to file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should rename a todo
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should trim whitespace from new content
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should fail with empty content
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should fail with invalid index
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should persist renaming to file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete a todo from the middle
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete the first todo
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete the last todo
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should handle deleting all todos
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should fail with invalid index
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should persist deletion to file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 6. Delete test-only Todo list file should delete the todo file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 6. Delete test-only Todo list file should handle deleting non-existent file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 7. Complex E2E workflow should handle a complete workflow
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 8. Error handling and validation should handle corrupted JSON file
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 8. Error handling and validation should handle non-array JSON
TodoManager E2E Test Suite 8. Error handling and validation should handle invalid todo structure
title bar provider toggles affect Project and Global views
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should render projects list
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should handle project selection
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should handle refresh button
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should toggle activity mode
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should cycle through sort methods
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should toggle filter buttons
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should filter out deleted projects
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should show basic controls
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should handle context menu events
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should show project tooltips
ProjectsPaneMVVM (direct facade) should indicate unmatched projects
App renders project view after splash and switches to global view when requested
App applies provider filter changes via DI container and persists preference
App updates activity mode state when ProjectView requests a toggle
App switches to git view when requested
App switches to commit view when requested
DI provider filter projects & sessions reflect provider allow-list
CommitView renders provided data
CommitView allows switching repositories
Unified project loader (projects + todos) merges both sources, computes startDate and active counts (agnostic)
GitView renders provided repositories
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) loadProjects should load all projects from repository
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) loadProjects should handle repository errors gracefully
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) loadProjects should set loading state during operation
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) loadProjects should clear errors on successful load
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project access methods should return all projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project access methods should return immutable project array
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project access methods should find project by ID
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project access methods should return null for non-existent project ID
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project filtering should filter existing projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project filtering should filter unmatched projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project filtering should sort projects by date (most recent first)
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project counts should count total projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project counts should count existing projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) project counts should count unmatched projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) UI helper methods should generate display names for existing projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) UI helper methods should use flattened name for unmatched projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) UI helper methods should generate correct status icons
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) UI helper methods should generate informative tooltips
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) UI helper methods should generate tooltips for unmatched projects
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) error handling should track and clear errors
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) refresh functionality should reload projects when refreshed
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) edge cases should handle empty repository
ProjectsViewModel (agnostic) edge cases should handle projects with same modification time
PathUtils createFlattenedPath should flatten Unix paths correctly
PathUtils createFlattenedPath should flatten Windows paths correctly
PathUtils createFlattenedPath should handle paths with special characters
PathUtils createFlattenedPath should handle empty and root paths
PathUtils guessPathFromFlattenedName should unflatten Unix-ish paths permissively
PathUtils guessPathFromFlattenedName should unflatten Windows paths permissively
PathUtils guessPathFromFlattenedName should handle empty and invalid paths
PathUtils findProjectDirectory should find project directory from flattened path
PathUtils findProjectDirectory should find project directory from metadata
PathUtils findProjectDirectory should find parent project for subdirectory paths
PathUtils findProjectDirectory should return not found for non-existent project
PathUtils getRealProjectPath should get real project path from session (jsonl match)
PathUtils getRealProjectPath should return null when session not found
PathUtils validatePath should validate existing paths
PathUtils validatePath should return false for non-existent paths
Project-Todo MVVM Integration ViewModels integration should load projects and sessions independently
Project-Todo MVVM Integration ViewModels integration should filter sessions by project path
Project-Todo MVVM Integration ViewModels integration should provide project and session statistics
Project-Todo MVVM Integration ViewModels integration should handle error states gracefully
Project-Todo MVVM Integration ViewModels integration should maintain independent loading states
Project-Todo MVVM Integration Simple repository testing should create different repository instances for isolation
Project-Todo MVVM Integration Simple repository testing should work with different data sets
Project-Todo MVVM Integration Real-world workflow simulation should simulate project selection and todo viewing workflow
Project-Todo MVVM Integration Real-world workflow simulation should handle session-based todo management
ChatHistoryViewModel loadProjectPrompts should load prompts for a specific project
ChatHistoryViewModel loadProjectPrompts should handle non-existent project gracefully
ChatHistoryViewModel loadProjectPrompts should handle repository errors gracefully
ChatHistoryViewModel loadProjectPrompts should set loading state during operation
ChatHistoryViewModel loadProjectPrompts should clear previous prompts when loading new project
ChatHistoryViewModel conversation management should get current conversation
ChatHistoryViewModel conversation management should load all conversations
ChatHistoryViewModel conversation management should get conversation for specific project
ChatHistoryViewModel prompt access methods should return immutable prompts array
ChatHistoryViewModel prompt access methods should filter prompts by role
ChatHistoryViewModel prompt access methods should filter prompts by session
ChatHistoryViewModel prompt access methods should get prompts sorted by date
ChatHistoryViewModel search functionality should search prompts by content
ChatHistoryViewModel search functionality should search within specific project
ChatHistoryViewModel search functionality should handle empty search results
ChatHistoryViewModel statistics should calculate chat statistics
ChatHistoryViewModel statistics should return empty statistics for project without prompts
ChatHistoryViewModel statistics should count unique sessions
ChatHistoryViewModel statistics should get prompt count
ChatHistoryViewModel sorting and filtering should set and get sort order
ChatHistoryViewModel sorting and filtering should check if project has prompts
ChatHistoryViewModel error handling should track and clear errors
ChatHistoryViewModel refresh functionality should reload current project prompts
ChatHistoryViewModel edge cases should handle empty repository
ChatHistoryViewModel edge cases should handle prompts with same timestamp
Real Provider Filtering (No Mocks) Provider filtering actually works with real file system
Real Provider Filtering (No Mocks) View models notify listeners on real data changes
Real Provider Filtering (No Mocks) Filter state persists through view changes
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) getAllProjects loads projects from the provided directory
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) getAllProjects should handle non-existent projects directory gracefully
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) getAllProjects should filter existing vs non-existing projects correctly
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) getProject finds existing project by ID
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) getProject should return null for non-existent project ID
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) projectExists checks project existence by flattened id
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) utility methods should provide correct projects directory path
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) utility methods should build correct project paths
FileSystemProjectRepository (agnostic) utility methods should check accessibility
Todo Merge Functionality Duplicate Detection should identify exact duplicates
Todo Merge Functionality Duplicate Detection should identify case-insensitive duplicates
Todo Merge Functionality Duplicate Detection should not identify different todos as duplicates
Todo Merge Functionality Merge Logic should merge two todo lists removing duplicates
Todo Merge Functionality Merge Logic should handle empty source list
Todo Merge Functionality Merge Logic should handle empty target list
Todo Merge Functionality Merge Logic should handle all duplicates
Todo Merge Functionality Session Selection for Merge should identify older session as source
Todo Merge Functionality Session Selection for Merge should handle sessions with same date
Todo Merge Functionality Tab Multi-Selection should allow selecting exactly 2 tabs
Todo Merge Functionality Tab Multi-Selection should not allow merge with 1 tab
Todo Merge Functionality Tab Multi-Selection should not allow merge with 3 tabs
Todo Merge Functionality Tab Multi-Selection should toggle tab selection
Todo Merge Functionality Merge Preview Calculations should calculate correct merge statistics
Todo Merge Functionality Status Conflict Resolution should keep target status for duplicate todos
Session Memory Feature should remember session selection per project
Session Memory Feature should update session selection when changed
Session Memory Feature should return undefined for unknown project
Context Menu Actions Copy Session ID should copy session ID to clipboard
Context Menu Actions Merge Mode Selection should start merge mode with one tab selected
TodosViewModel loadSessions should load all sessions from repository
TodosViewModel loadSessions should handle repository errors gracefully
TodosViewModel loadSessions should set loading state during operation
TodosViewModel loadSessions should clear errors on successful load
TodosViewModel session access methods should return all sessions
TodosViewModel session access methods should return immutable session array
TodosViewModel session access methods should find session by ID
TodosViewModel session access methods should return null for non-existent session ID
TodosViewModel project filtering should filter sessions by project path
TodosViewModel project filtering should return empty array for project with no sessions
TodosViewModel project filtering should handle sessions without project paths
TodosViewModel todo management should get all todos from all sessions
TodosViewModel todo management should get todos for specific session
TodosViewModel todo management should return empty array for non-existent session
TodosViewModel todo management should filter todos by status
TodosViewModel todo management should filter todos by priority
TodosViewModel session statistics should count total sessions
TodosViewModel session statistics should count sessions with todos
TodosViewModel session statistics should count empty sessions
TodosViewModel session statistics should count total todos
TodosViewModel session statistics should count todos by status
TodosViewModel session sorting should sort sessions by date (most recent first)
TodosViewModel session sorting should sort sessions by todo count (most todos first)
TodosViewModel todo mutation operations should save todos for session
TodosViewModel todo mutation operations should handle save errors gracefully
TodosViewModel error handling should track and clear errors
TodosViewModel refresh functionality should reload sessions when refreshed
TodosViewModel edge cases should handle empty repository
TodosViewModel edge cases should handle sessions with same modification time
Aggregator merges provider results and dedupes sessions per provider/project
Aggregator reports error when every provider fails
UI Interaction Tests Tab Click Behaviors should handle normal click
UI Interaction Tests Tab Click Behaviors should handle Ctrl+Click for multi-select
UI Interaction Tests Tab Click Behaviors should handle Cmd+Click on Mac
UI Interaction Tests Right-Click Context Menu should show context menu on right-click
UI Interaction Tests Right-Click Context Menu should hide context menu on click away
UI Interaction Tests Right-Click Context Menu should hide context menu on Escape key
UI Interaction Tests Merge Button Visibility should show merge button when 2 tabs selected
UI Interaction Tests Merge Button Visibility should hide merge button when 1 tab selected
UI Interaction Tests Merge Button Visibility should hide merge button when 3 tabs selected
UI Interaction Tests Merge Button Visibility should hide merge button when no tabs selected
UI Interaction Tests Todo Item Multi-Selection should select single item on click
UI Interaction Tests Todo Item Multi-Selection should select range on Shift+Click
UI Interaction Tests Todo Item Multi-Selection should toggle selection on Ctrl+Click
UI Interaction Tests Keyboard Navigation should move selected items up with Ctrl+Up
UI Interaction Tests Keyboard Navigation should move selected items down with Ctrl+Down
UI Interaction Tests Keyboard Navigation should not move when at boundary
UI Interaction Tests Keyboard Navigation should only move contiguous selections
UI Interaction Tests Status Bar Messages should show correct message for no selection
UI Interaction Tests Status Bar Messages should show correct message for single selection
UI Interaction Tests Status Bar Messages should show correct message for multiple contiguous selection
UI Interaction Tests Status Bar Messages should show correct message for non-contiguous selection
git status collectors collectGitStatus returns repository summary
git status collectors collectCommitHistory returns commits with stats and co-authors
